Portfolio Document

Selected ML Systems and Applied Research

Data specialist with hands-on experience in modeling, evaluation, feature pipelines, experimentation, and MLOps operations. I care about readable systems, stable metrics, and documentation surfaces that make technical decisions easy to review.

Eunseok Lee Data Specialist eunseok.lee@example.com

Profile Summary

Data specialist with hands-on experience in modeling, evaluation, feature pipelines, experimentation, and MLOps operations. I care about readable systems, stable metrics, and documentation surfaces that make technical decisions easy to review.

This portfolio is structured for print review: an overview page first, followed by one case-study sheet per project.

Capability Summary

Data

Data contracts, feature pipelines, observability, and quality monitoring for evolving datasets.

AI

Supervised learning, retrieval systems, evaluation design, and model iteration tied to business outcomes.

Infra / MLOps

Operationalizing models with reproducible pipelines, CI checks, and production monitoring.

Research

Applied research that turns methods exploration into documented results and implementation guidance.

Research Highlights

Data-Centric Evaluation Patterns for Production ML
Internal Research Note | 2025

A practical framework for evaluating production ML systems by treating data quality, cohort stability, and review surfaces as first-class parts of the evaluation loop.

Failure Slice Analysis for Support Retrieval Systems
Applied ML Workshop | 2024

Explores how slice-based benchmark construction can reveal failure patterns in technical support retrieval systems that aggregate metrics hide.

Case Study 1

Feature Store Quality Gates for Retention Models

Production ML Platform | 2025 | Data Specialist, MLOps Engineer

Problem

Retention scoring quality was undermined by feature drift, unstable upstream schema changes, and manual release reviews that made it hard to separate model issues from data issues.

Approach

Introduced versioned feature expectations, automated validation gates, and a release review workflow that tied experiment evidence to data lineage and rollback guidance.

Outcome

Improved reviewer trust in model promotion, reduced schema-related incidents, and made retention model releases faster and more defensible across analytics and platform teams.

18% alert precision lift43% fewer schema incidents2x faster release reviews
Feature StoreModel MonitoringData QualityMLOps
GitHub RepoDemoSlides
Read Full Case Study
Case Study 2

Retrieval Evaluation Bench for Technical Support Search

Applied Research System | 2024 | AI Researcher, Data Specialist

Problem

Search quality decisions were being made from anecdotal complaints and aggregate metrics, leaving the team without a reliable way to understand where retrieval actually failed.

Approach

Built a benchmark set with failure slices, compared sparse, dense, and hybrid retrievers, and packaged the findings in a review surface that product and QA teams could use.

Outcome

Created a repeatable retrieval evaluation workflow, improved ranking quality on the most valuable support slices, and gave non-research stakeholders a concrete artifact for search reviews.

27% nDCG improvement6 benchmark slices1 review surface for PM and QA
RetrievalEvaluationBenchmarkingSearch
GitHub RepoPaper
Read Full Case Study
Case Study 3

Clinical Risk Scoring Pipeline with Scheduled Validation

Healthcare ML Delivery | 2023 | Data Engineer, MLOps Engineer

Problem

A clinically promising model existed mainly in notebooks and ad hoc scripts, which made validation, traceability, and internal review difficult.

Approach

Rebuilt the workflow as a scheduled pipeline with parameterized training, data validation, evaluation artifacts, and tracked model outputs for every run.

Outcome

Gave the research team a reliable handoff path into operations, shortened retraining cycles, and improved the audit readiness of model refreshes.

Weekly validated runs30% faster retraining cycleAudit-ready artifacts
HealthcareAirflowValidationMLflow
GitHub RepoSlides
Read Full Case Study
